# Clinical Trial Results

**Protocol:** [`r protocol_id`](`r nct_url`), version `r protocol_version` (IND 156493)  
**Institution:** Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai / Mount Sinai Hospital  
**Principal investigator:** Deborah Y. Doroshow, MD, PhD  
**Trial registration:** [`r nct_id`](`r nct_url`)  
**Data cut:** `r format(Sys.Date(), "%d %B %Y")`

---
